caption: Diffraction pattern for illite
computational_message: Small coherent domains broaden and may shift apparent peak maxima away from ideal Bragg positions.
limitations: Figure is qualitative reference, not a numeric fitting target.

caption: Illite/mica layer structure with z coordinates
computational_message: Atomic z coordinates feed the cosine terms of G(theta).
source_quote_fragment: fractional position in relation to the 10 A spacing

caption: Layer structure factor G for dioctahedral illite versus 2theta
computational_message: G(theta) must be multiplied by the interference function and LP to simulate a diffraction tracing.
source_quote_fragment: This does not model a diffraction tracing

caption: Spacing S formed by A/B layer sequence
computational_message: Sequence frequencies sigma_S depend on component proportions and Reichweite/conditional probabilities.
limitations: One displayed sequence is only one of many possible arrays.
source_quote_fragment: one of the possible spacings S
